channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: LTO cancels driver’s license of female vlogger over safety violations
item.description: The Land Transportation Office (LTO) has officially revoked the driver’s license of female vlogger Ishi Lee, who gained attention online for driving while holding a recording device. The decision foll...

item.title: Lancaster man sentenced to 14 years for delivering fentanyl via drone that caused a death
item.description: Christopher 'Crany' Laney, 37, pleaded guilty to supplying fentanyl using an unregistered drone, which led to the death of a woman identified only as J.K. in January 2023. Laney operated the drone fro...

item.title: Trump endorses Sticker Mule CEO Anthony Constantino in race to replace Elise Stefanik
item.description: President Donald Trump has endorsed Anthony Constantino, the CEO of the sticker company Sticker Mule, in the Republican primary to replace Rep. Elise Stefanik in New York's 21st Congressional District...

item.title: Over 40% of Capetonians at Risk Due to High Air Pollution Levels, Study Finds
item.description: A new study from the University of Cape Town (UCT) has highlighted the severe air pollution risks facing the city. Using satellite data, researchers found that over 40% of Cape Town's population is ex...

item.title: US extends Iran ceasefire amid stalled talks and ongoing Strait of Hormuz tensions
item.description: The United States has extended its ceasefire with Iran just hours before it was due to expire, signalling a temporary pause in escalating hostilities despite continued diplomatic deadlock. President D...

item.title: Security arrangements for US-Iran talks limit Supreme Court operations and suspend FCC proceedings
item.description: Islamabad is witnessing tight security arrangements ahead of the expected second round of US-Iran peace talks, and this has directly impacted the functioning of key judicial institutions. The Supreme ...

item.title: Heath Ceramics and Artek Collaborate on Tile Table Collection and Ceramic Chess Board
item.description: Heath Ceramics, a California-based studio known for its artisanal approach to clay, has partnered with Artek, the Finnish furniture company founded on the principles of Alvar Aalto, to expand their Ti...

item.title: Clear skies expected for peak of Lyrid meteor shower in the UK
item.description: The UK is set to experience excellent conditions for viewing the Lyrid meteor shower, which has been ongoing since 15 April. The shower is expected to peak on Wednesday night, with around 10 to 15 met...

item.title: US-Iran Negotiations Face Uncertainty Amidst Tensions
item.description: Amidst ongoing tensions in the Strait of Hormuz, President Donald Trump has delivered a series of mixed signals regarding the potential path forward for the United States' relationship with Iran. This...

item.title: DSS Warns Police Of Planned Farmer Kidnappings In Kwara Communities
item.description: The Department of State Services (DSS) has raised an alarm over a suspected plan by armed bandits to intensify the kidnapping of farmers in parts of Kwara State, which could seriously disrupt farming ...

item.title: Spain calls for EU to review partnership with Israel over human rights concerns
item.description: Spain don officially write EU, talk say dem wan cut diplomatic ties with Israel because of human rights wahala wey dey happen for Gaza and other areas wey Israel dey occupy. Spanish Prime Minister Ped...

item.title: Speaker Johnson Defends House Ethics Committee Amid Recent Misconduct Resignations
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson addressed recent criticisms of the House Ethics Committee following the resignations of Representatives Eric Swalwell (D-Calif.) and Tony Gonzales (R-Texas) due to sexual mi...

item.title: BINI Aiah Receives Heartfelt Message from Fan After Making History at Coachella
item.description: BINI member Aiah Arceta recently received a heartfelt message from a fan following her debut at the globally recognized Coachella music festival. Her participation marked a historic milestone, not jus...

item.title: Finance Minister Discusses Pakistan’s Capital Market Strategy with EU Envoy
item.description: Finance Minister Muhammad Aurangzeb on Tuesday informed the European Union Ambassador to Pakistan, Raimundas Karoblis, that the government is actively working on a diversified capital markets strategy...

item.title: Tanzanian Clubs Shine at East Africa Development Swimming Gala
item.description: Tanzania showed strong progress in swimming at the East Africa Development Swimming Gala held at FK Secondary School, Bahari Beach. The two-day event hosted over 600 young swimmers from Tanzania, Ugan...

item.title: Israeli Soldiers Disciplined for Damaging Jesus Statue in Southern Lebanon
item.description: So, it seems like a bit of a drama unfolded in southern Lebanon, innit? The Israeli military has decided to give two soldiers a 30-day detention, and they’re also being removed from combat duty after ...

item.title: Louis Trichardt Residents Take Action to Improve Their Town Amid Service Delivery Issues
item.description: On Saturday, 18 April 2026, residents of Louis Trichardt, a town in Limpopo, united to clean up their streets, fix infrastructure, and restore pride in their community. This initiative, born out of fr...

item.title: High Court Clears Way for Arrest of Governors After Petition Changes
item.description: Nairobi — The High Court in Kiambu has removed conservatory orders that had previously stopped the arrest or detention of governors and certain public officials, paving the way for the police and othe...

item.title: Tinubu reshuffles cabinet, replaces Edun with Oyedele as Finance Minister
item.description: President Bola Tinubu has announced a cabinet reshuffle that sees Wale Edun relieved of his duties as Finance Minister, with Taiwo Oyedele stepping in as his successor. Edun, who had been in the posit...

item.title: China Develops Large Composite Module for Long March 10 Reusable Rocket
item.description: China has unveiled its first reusable 5-meter-wide composite propulsion module, marking a significant advancement in its aerospace capabilities. Developed by the China Aerospace and Technology Corpora...
